title: Questions from Quarantine: COVID-19 Perspectives, the Lack of PPE, and Staying Safe and Sane at Home
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and don't forget to Tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine for a chance to have your question featured in next week's episode!
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and don't forget to Tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine for a chance to have your question featured in next week's episode! result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address audience questions submitted under the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' focuses on providing guidance during the COVID-19 crisis, covering topics such as perspectives on the pandemic, the critical shortage of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), and strategies for maintaining mental and physical well-being while in isolation. The initiative aims to offer expert advice on staying safe and sane, encouraging public participation by featuring selected questions in subsequent episodes aired every Tuesday.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列名为“隔离问题”，旨在回答观众通过话题标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine提交的疑问。节目聚焦于COVID-19危机期间的指导，涵盖对疫情的看法、个人防护装备严重短缺的问题，以及在隔离期间保持身心健康的方法。该项目每周二播出，通过提供专家建议，帮助公众在危机中保持安全与理智，并鼓励观众参与互动，其问题有机会在后续节目中被选中讨论。
